page.title: Media Upload
page.description: Upload AI-generated images and videos to automatically extract and analyze metadata.

dropzone.dragInactive: Drag and drop images or videos, or click to upload
dropzone.supportedFormats: Images: JPG, PNG, GIF, BMP, WebP, TIFF | Videos: MP4, WebM, MOV, AVI, MKV (Max 500MB, unlimited files)

guide.title: Upload Guide
guide.metadataExtraction: Metadata from images generated by ComfyUI, Stable Diffusion, NovelAI, etc. will be automatically extracted.
guide.videoProcessing: Video files are processed via FFmpeg to extract metadata (duration, codec, resolution, etc.) and generate animated thumbnails.
guide.dataAnalysis: Prompts, model names, generation parameters, etc. are automatically analyzed for search and classification.
guide.imageVersions: Uploaded images are stored in three versions: original, optimized, and thumbnail.
guide.autoGrouping: If auto-collection rules are configured, images will be automatically classified into relevant groups upon upload.

promptPreview.title: Prompt Preview
promptPreview.description: Select an image to instantly view AI metadata without uploading to server.
promptPreview.dragOrClick: Drag or click to select an image
promptPreview.noUpload: Images are analyzed in browser only, not uploaded to server
